mutants.expected_failure: Expands lexical triggers instead of repairing semantic extraction.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability not causally used for memory extraction

mutants.expected_failure: Calls the capability but lets keywords decide whether a memory exists.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic response did not causally control memory extraction

mutants.expected_failure: Collapses rich memory output into a fixed category and loses the fact.
mutants.failure_marker: memory fact or evidence was lost
